name: FPE (Riley X Bubble)
description:
Saw some Riley X Bubble art and decided to make a quick little bot.

As per usual, I'm using UnknownAliveness's starter pack, so thanks for making it!

The characters that are in this bot are

Bubble (obviously)
Riley (obviously)
Claire
Zip
Lana
ALICE
Petunia
Lizzy
and Ruby!

Enjoy :P
